title: tanacetum suaveolens
intro: Tanacetum suaveolens, also known as Sweet Camomile or White Camomile, is a perennial herb in the daisy family that is native to Eastern Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, as well as its ability to soothe and calm the nervous system. The health benefits of Tanacetum suaveolens include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation and improved sleep, and alleviating symptoms of menstrual cramps and digestive issues. Tanacetum suaveolens can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce inflammation.
